reason_for_decision: The article passes as a foundation explainer because it defines passive detection clearly, distinguishes it from active sensing, and keeps the limits of passive methods explicit.
strengths: The article explains passive detection as a family of sensing approaches rather than one product category.
It is strong on the dependence of passive methods on available emissions, lighting, and geometry.
The distinction between passive detection and passive radar is especially helpful for beginners.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass for a beginner-facing article. It is readable, technically responsible, and does a good job preventing common misunderstandings about passive sensing.
